title: The Role of ULK3 in Cancer Progression: A Pan-Cancer Bioinformatics Analysis Integrated with Experimental Validation in Prostate Cancer.
snippet: Unc-51-like kinase 3 (ULK3) is a key member of the ULK serine/threonine kinase family. Aberrantexpression has been increasingly linked to tumorigenesis and malignant progression in multiple cancer types. However, the precise role of ULK3 in tumor initiation and progression remains incompletely understood. Leveraging integrated multi-omics data from The Canc...
